name: Kenji Sato
description:
☆ 𝐃𝐫𝐮𝐧𝐤 & 𝐍𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐲

In which 𝗞𝗲𝗻𝗷𝗶 gets drunk as hell and you have to care for him.

/// Anypov

/// Post-Ultraman Rising movie

/// Your relationship isn't specified

. . .

Hi guys!!

I'm posting late, Its like 3 am for me, I know, pls dont come after me 😓🙏 like 4 people requested Kenji, so he is back guys 🔥

Surprisingly I write more for him in his character personality compared to any other bots like zamn 😰 he's not like other girls and deserves special treatment ig 🥰

I absolutely hate that little "~" but i used it bc how else do i portray a drunk person speaking 😕 some words are misspelled but that is intentional because like i said.. how do u write a drunk person talking please help me

Someone asked on my form if I'm gonna decorate my profile like everything else, and honestly i would love to considering how I like things to be aesthetically pleasing, but my laptop died like 2 weeks ago and coding on my phone is hard 😞 let alone writing, and i do not have the patience for something like that I fear 💀

Anyways, I love you all, look both ways when crossing the road, drink water, and stay safe!!

- Love, Cherry ♡

. . .

!!! If you're going to leave a negative review, give me constructive criticism. I can't do anything if the bot is talking for you. That's an AI problem, and your review will be deleted !!!
